chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1474 of 2017 C.P. No.D-1957 of 2017 C.P. No.D-2279 of 2017 C.P. No.D-2522 of 2017 C.P. No.D-3408 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.7513/2017. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 13.09.2021 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Awan, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that in view of the judgment of the Tribunal, he does not press these petitions. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in all connected petitions. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
